global_description: A small, round-bodied bird with a bright yellow throat and olive-brown upperparts. It features a distinctive black mask across the face and a white belly. The wings and tail are short and rounded, with a smooth feather texture.

part_details.throat: Bright yellow, contrasting with the darker face and body.
part_details.face: Black mask covering the eyes and forehead, giving a bandit-like appearance.
part_details.upperparts: Olive-brown, blending into the wings and back.
part_details.belly: White, providing a stark contrast to the upperparts.
part_details.wings: Short, rounded, matching the olive-brown of the upper body.

spatial_relations: The black mask covers the face and extends across the eyes.
The bright yellow throat is positioned below the black mask.
The olive-brown upperparts transition into the wings and back.
The white belly is located beneath the olive-brown upperparts.
